steps.name: Post to Discord
steps.run:
# Skip if webhook not configured yet
if [ -z "$WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
  echo "DISCORD_DEVOPS_WEBHOOK not set - skipping"
  exit 0
fi

LABELS=$(echo '${{ toJSON(github.event.issue.labels.*.name) }}' | jq -r 'join(", ")')

HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/discord_response -w "%{http_code}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "$(jq -n \
    --arg title "${{ github.event.issue.title }}" \
    --arg url "${{ github.event.issue.html_url }}" \
    --arg author "${{ github.event.issue.user.login }}" \
    --arg labels "$LABELS" \
    '{
      embeds: [{
        title: ("New issue: " + $title),
        url: $url,
        color: 3447003,
        fields: [
          { name: "Author", value: $author, inline: true },
          { name: "Labels", value: (if $labels == "" then "none" else $labels end), inline: true }
        ]
      }]
    }')" \
  "$WEBHOOK_URL")

if [ "$HTTP_CODE" -lt 200 ] || [ "$HTTP_CODE" -ge 300 ]; then
  echo "Discord webhook failed with HTTP $HTTP_CODE"
  cat /tmp/discord_response
  exit 1
fi
echo "Discord response: $HTTP_CODE"
